query:
-- Revenue: Stripe payments (subscriptions + credit top-ups)
SELECT 
  'subscriptions' as type,
  COUNT(*) as count,
  SUM(amount) / 100.0 as total_gbp
FROM transactions
WHERE status = 'completed' AND type = 'subscription'
UNION ALL
SELECT 
  'credit_topups' as type,
  COUNT(*) as count,
  SUM(amount) / 100.0 as total_gbp
FROM transactions
WHERE status = 'completed' AND type = 'credit_purchase'
UNION ALL
SELECT
  'total_revenue' as type,
  COUNT(*) as count,
  SUM(amount) / 100.0 as total_gbp
FROM transactions
WHERE status = 'completed';

-- Credits sold vs credits consumed
SELECT
  SUM(CASE WHEN type = 'credit_purchase' OR type = 'subscription_grant' THEN amount ELSE 0 END) as credits_sold,
  SUM(CASE WHEN type = 'video_generation' OR type = 'render' OR type = 'deduction' THEN ABS(amount) ELSE 0 END) as credits_consumed
FROM credit_transactions;

-- Jobs completed this month
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as completed_jobs,
  AVG(totalScenes) as avg_scenes
FROM musicVideoJobs
WHERE status = 'completed' AND createdAt >= '2026-05-01';
